items.how_used: 基于1950-2000年USGS数据，对总用水量进行线性回归，预测2025年用水量为497.8 Bgal/day。
items.source_excerpt: From these trends, we can calculate that the total water usage in the year 2025 will be equal to approximately 497.8 billion gallons per day, or 181,681 billion gallons of water per year.

items.how_used: 使用折线图展示总用水量、人口、各行业用水量随时间的变化趋势，以及RO产水量和成本下降趋势。
items.source_excerpt: Water usage in different sectors has exhibited different growth over the years. For example, irrigation and thermoelectric power water use has steadied in recent years... (accompanied by line charts)

items.how_used: 列出6条通用假设和模型1的3条具体假设，包括人口增长、用水类别、技术成本下降等。
items.source_excerpt: General Assumptions for all Models: 1. The population of the United States will increase at current rates and will reach about 353 million by the year 2025... Assumptions specific for Model 1: 1. Brackish water costs $1.64 per 1000 gallons to desalinize and seawater costs $2.50 per 1000 gallons to desalinize.

items.how_used: 建立线性规划模型，以最小化总成本为目标，决策变量为各水源（地表水、地下水、淡化水）的供水量，约束包括满足总需求、地下水减少目标等。
items.source_excerpt: Our models seek to reduce reliance on groundwater and surface water by the year 2025. It analyzes two variables: water withdrawal and cost. We aim to model the projected cost of reducing groundwater and surface water consumption for various amounts.

items.how_used: 对淡化水成本、地下水减少比例等参数进行灵敏度分析，考察不同情景下的总成本变化。
items.source_excerpt: Our models seek to reduce reliance on groundwater and surface water by the year 2025. It analyzes two variables: water withdrawal and cost.

items.how_used: 使用美国地图展示各州用水量分布，直观呈现区域差异。
items.source_excerpt: The USGS also reports the current distribution of water through the eight main sectors. (accompanied by a map of the US showing water withdrawal by state)

items.how_used: 引言从水资源重要性切入，引用诗句和名言，结合具体案例（Orne, Atlanta等）说明问题紧迫性，并概述论文策略。
items.source_excerpt: "Water, water, everywhere, nor any drop to drink" - Rhyme of the Ancient Mariner... In this paper, we will seek to incorporate this knowledge and these strategies to solve the nation’s water constraints in the most cost-effective means possible.

items.how_used: 引用USGS报告、人口普查数据、Poseidon Resources等来源，并在文中标注。
